name: Attractive Strong Convenient Wooden Toy, Toy, for Dental Care Rest
description: Features:  The colorful color can better attract the attention of birds.  Entertaining enough to keep birds or parrot busy for a long period and they do enjoy playing with it.  This parrot block toy's type is stylish and attractive, which will catch bird's eyes immediately.  With the hanger, you can hang it on conveniently.  Great chewing and preening parrot toy to kill time and give dental care for your beloved birds.  Specification:  Material: Wooden  Color: Colorful  Accessories color: Random  Size: 2.5 x 10 x 33cm / 0.98 x 3.94 x 12.99 inch (appr.)    Package List:  1 x Hanging Toy Parrot
